result: If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure that every person—no matter where they’re born or who they are—has access to quality education and reliable information. Knowledge empowers people to make informed decisions, solve problems creatively, and understand one another more deeply. It can break cycles of poverty, drive innovation, and foster empathy across cultures. With a more informed and educated world, we’d be better equipped to tackle virtually every other challenge we face, from health and inequality to climate change and conflict.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
